name: Freelance Hourly Rate Calculator
description: Set rates by covering costs and desired income.

example.explanation: This helps set an hourly rate to meet annual income targets after expenses.

faqs.question: What are billable hours?
faqs.answer: Hours you can realistically charge clients, excluding admin and downtime.

faqs.question: Should I include taxes?
faqs.answer: Yes, include expected tax liabilities in expenses.

faqs.question: Should I charge above this rate?
faqs.answer: Yes, add a buffer for downtime, unpaid leaves, and profit margin.
